positive: A stylized, graphic illustration of an astronaut floating peacefully in space, surrounded by minimal nebula clouds and floating geometric forms. The astronaut should have a retro, clean aesthetic, rendered with thick, bold lines and limited color palette (deep indigo, burnt orange, cream white). The composition must be centered, with the figure filling the space dynamically. Use strong negative space and silhouette elements for high contrast, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Vector art style, pop art influence, kawaii sci-fi aesthetic, symmetrical balance, highly detailed illustration, clean background.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, messy, photorealism, low detail, messy lines, gradients, bokeh, low contrast
